description: An IT Security directive requires improved compartmentalization of external contractors in the HRMS. At the same time, HR needs to routinely audit the contractor roster for expired contracts. Using the verified roster at ~/Desktop/contractor_roster.csv, create a new department named exactly 'External Contractors'. Audit the contractors listed in the CSV against the date March 11, 2026. Deactivate any contractor whose contract expired before this date without deleting their record. For contractors with active contracts (expiring on or after March 11, 2026), assign them to the 'External Contractors' department while keeping them active.
